case_title: HOMES, BANNEKER vs. SILAFAU, ABRAHAM et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOMES, BANNEKER AS TO DEFENDANT SILAFAU, ABRAHAM SILAFAU, BEKA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOMES, BANNEKER SERVED DEC-28-1994, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SILAFAU, ABRAHAM SILAFAU, BEKA

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $140.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOMES, BANNEKER AS TO DEFENDANT SILAFAU, ABRAHAM SILAFAU, BEKA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOMES, BANNEKER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SILAFAU, ABRAHAM SILAFAU, BEKA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2-C BANNEKER WAY, UNIT 5 S.F, CA 94102
DECLARATION RE: LOST BY PLTF. FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOMES, BANNEKER

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOMES, BANNEKER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SILAFAU, ABRAHAM SILAFAU, BEKA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: RESTORED TO PLAINTIFF ON 1/6/95 $2,689.68 RENT, $560.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,389.68, LEASE FORFEITED
